Old manual cover. Reference for logo placement.

blocks.label: What is Kekspace?
blocks.original: Kekspace is a social interface for Web3 that blends the social elements of early 2000's social MMOs with Web3/DeFi utility.
blocks.rewrite: Kekspace is a social interface for Web3 that blends the social elements of early 2000's social MMOs with Web3/DeFi utility.

blocks.label: What can you do in Kekspace?
blocks.original: Play games, collect items, create your own virtual rooms, hang out with frens, access DeFi apps, and contribute funds, assets, and more!
blocks.rewrite: Play games, customize your character, decorate your own room, hang out with the community, and earn rewards. That's what's live right now — with a lot more to come.

blocks.label: Who is it for?
blocks.original: Kekspace is designed for users, projects, developers, communities, and companies who would like a Web3 native space that is both fun and functional.
blocks.rewrite: Gamers, communities, creators, and anyone who thinks virtual worlds should be fun again. If you're reading this, you're already the right audience.

blocks.label: Tagline
blocks.original: OWN THE MEME. BECOME THE MEME.
blocks.rewrite: OWN THE MEME. BECOME THE MEME.

blocks.label: Players
blocks.original: By incentivizing developers to make Kekspace their primary form of advertisement in the crypto sphere, this will become a central hub for gaming where social engagement, competition, and monetization are at its core.

blocks.label: Developers
blocks.original: Kekspace is designed to become the major crypto platform for the promotion of gaming and entertainment. By providing developers with an exciting community, a visual landscape, and significant cultural liquidity, developers will enable the success of their products with a fraction of the cost or effort.

notes: Art direction: Replace kekspace_banner.png with a character lineup — a row of colorful, diverse NPCs standing side by side. Pick the most vibrant characters to show off the art style.

blocks.label: Producers
blocks.original: Producer's will have an amazing platform not only to create, but market everything they do. Kekspace will provide competitive ad locations for producers to buy as top exposure throughout the crypto community.

blocks.label: Flexers
blocks.original: Kekspace will provide endless ways for consumers to stay engaged. Through ownership of NFT's, consumers will be able to own virtual land where they can show off their proudest achievements.

blocks.label: Welcome text
blocks.original: PepeCoin ($PEPECOIN) is the first and longest-running Pepe-themed cryptocurrency. It originally hatched on March 5th, 2016 on its own proof-of-work blockchain. Fairly mined by the community, with no pre-sale, no insider funding/sniping, and no funny business
blocks.rewrite: You made it. Kekspace is what happens when a community mines a frog coin in 2016 and refuses to stop building. A social world powered by Pepecoin — built by the people in it.

notes: Pepecoin origin details moved to Economy section. This is the warm welcome.
Welcome page with loading screens. Reference only.
